data.title: Market Reaction to Coinbase Hack ‘Overblown,’ Say Analysts as SEC Probe Sinks COIN
data.description:
• Barclays and Oppenheimer say sell-off may not reflect the isolated nature of the hack.
  • The attack compromised customer data through bribed support agents; Coinbase pledged reimbursements.
  • SEC investigation relates to 2021 user figures and is not tied to current disclosures.

data.title: Bitcoin Bulls Face $120M Challenge in Extending 'Stair-Step' Uptrend
data.description:
• BTC's latest sideways trading marks consolidation following the step higher into six-figure territory earlier this month.
  • Significant sell orders at $104,800 and $105,000 pose a challenge for the next leg higher.

data.title: FTX to Pay Over $5B to Creditors as Bankrupt Exchange Gears Up for Distribution
data.description:
• FTX creditors will start receiving over $5 billion in distributions from May 30 as part of the exchange's recovery plan.
  • Recoveries for creditors range from 54% to 120% of their original claims, based on the value at FTX's collapse in November 2022.
  • BitGo and Kraken will handle the distribution, transferring funds within one to three business days from the start date.

data.title: XRP Slides 4% as Bitcoin Traders Cautious of $105K Price Resistance
data.description:
• XRP led losses among major cryptocurrencies, falling over 4% as the market stalled after last week’s rally.
  • Bitcoin remains above $104,000, facing resistance at $105,000, with analysts predicting a potential correction.
  • The crypto market's total capitalization dropped 2% to $3.3 trillion, with Ethereum and Solana near key technical levels.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds Above $100K, Altcoins Slide as Analyst Sees Crypto Rally Into Summer
data.description:
• Bitcoin dipped to just above $101,000 on Thursday before rebounding above $103,000.
  • Altcoins underperformed with APT, AVAX and UNI declining 6%-7%.
  • Analysts suggest the crypto pullback is a correction within a broader uptrend.

data.title: SEC Is Probing Coinbase Over User Number Misstatement Concern
data.description:
• Crypto exchange Coinbase has confirmed a NYT report that it is probed by the SEC over concern is misstated user numbers several years ago.
  • Shares are lower by 6.6% on Thursday as this news combines with earlier disclosure of a data breach.

data.title: Litecoin’s ETF Hopes Rise Even as Price Retreats From $101 Peak
data.description:
• Litecoin experienced a sharp 6.05% correction, dropping from $101.90 to $95.73 amid heightened market volatility.
  • US-China trade agreement developments are influencing cryptocurrency prices, with LTC showing bullish momentum despite the recent pullback.
  • Institutional interest in crypto assets continues to grow, with SEC decisions on spot ETFs for Litecoin and other altcoins creating market anticipation.

data.title: Crypto Exchange CEO's Daughter, Grandson Targeted in Paris Kidnap Attempt
data.description:
• The daughter and grandson of French crypto exchange Paymium's CEO were targeted in a kidnap attempt, France 24 reported.
  • Kidnapping cases related to crypto have been growing in the country.

data.title: Uniswap (UNI) Falls 6% as Institutions Offload $82M, Still Up 20% in a Month
data.description:
• UNI token plummets 5.59% in 24 hours, dropping from $6.658 to $6.286 amid heightened market volatility.
  • Major institutional addresses moved over 11.65 million UNI tokens ($82.38M) to Coinbase Prime, following another 9 million UNI deposit just two weeks prior.
  • Uniswap introduces one-click swaps for smart wallets with EIP-5792 support, aiming to improve user experience despite market turbulence.

data.title: 0x Acquires Competitor Flood in Push to Boost Share of $2.3B DEX Aggregator Market
data.description:
• 0x said it bought rival Flood to enhance its competitiveness in the DEX aggregation market.
  • The acquisition was driven by Flood's proprietary software and its team of developers.
  • 0x aims to leverage the acquisition to offer better trade prices and capture market share from larger aggregators.
